title: erodium foetidum subsp. celtibericum
intro: Erodium foetidum subsp. celtibericum, also known as the Spanish filaree or wild mignonette, is a subspecies of the Erodium foetidum plant, a type of flowering plant in the geranium family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Erodium foetidum subsp. celtibericum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
